# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    K = int(data[1])
    A = list(map(int, data[2:]))
    
    A.sort()
    
    min_diff = float('inf')
    
    # We need to keep N - K elements
    for i in range(K + 1):
        if i > N - K:
            break
        j = i + (N - K)
        if j > N:
            break
        current_diff = A[j - 1] - A[i]
        if current_diff < min_diff:
            min_diff = current_diff
    
    print(min_diff)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
